work.title: Software Engineer at Warp Development
work.description: I work in a software development team where we build and maintain software products for high profile clients around South Africa with International reach.
stack: Test Automation with  Appium and Webdriver

work.title: Software Developer at Lava Lamp Lab
work.description:
I built and published 3 ionic mobile applications for a fitness on demand start-up. The suit of apps includes a client facing app available for download by the general public. A trainer app for trainers on the platform as well as a video calling app for online training sessions.

My role extends maintenance of above mentioned apps and feature updates. Additional to my role as a mobile developer , I am involved on other projects where I tackle backend specific tasks

work.title: Technical Intern at WC Colab for eInclusion and Social Innovation | Core Team
work.description:
My role included researching and implementing concepts themed after social innovation and improvement.

One of the biggest project I undertook while being an intern here was to build a mobile application that would serve as social hub for students to interact , share information about ongoing campus events , trade in goods etc .
This was collaborative effort with an exchange student from a university in Belgium. 

During my internship, I was also part of a team involved in designing and delivering short programming boot camps and robotics projects to high school students from underprivileged communities.

work.title: Freelance Software Developer
work.description:
I take on freelance contracts to build awesome looking web and mobile apps for clients in Cape Town and Around South Africa.

I recently worked with a Client, whose project was building a platform for eLearning focusing early childhood development. My role in the project was designing and developing sections of their cross platform mobile application.

work.title: Physics 151 Tutor at the University of the Western Cape
work.description:
I Conducted work as a tutor for a first year physics laboratory course assisting students in Scientific experimentation with focus on conceptual physics & measurement concepts.

My role included assisting in delivering course work during laboratory practical’s and conducting tutorial sessions with students who needs extra assistance outside of practical timeslots.
